channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Beyond evangelicals, Trump and his allies courted smaller faith groups, from the Amish to Chabad
item.description: A social-media tribute to Coptic Christians. A billboard in Amish country. A visit to a revered Jewish gravesite. While Donald Trump's lock on the white evangelical vote is legendary, he and his campaign allies also wooed smaller religious groups, far from the mainstream.
item.dc:creator: PETER SMITH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here’s how Trump and the GOP may try to weaken Obamacare
item.description: Republican control of the White House and Congress sets the stage for potentially seismic changes including curtailing Medicaid, weakening patient protections, and increasing premium costs for millions.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Armour, Sam Whitehead, and Julie Rovner, MPR News

item.title: Trump chooses Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Thursday named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Democrat Bob Casey concedes to Republican David McCormick in Pennsylvania Senate contest
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — Democratic Sen. Bob Casey of Pennsylvania conceded his reelection bid to Republican David McCormick on Thursday, as a statewide recount showed no signs of closing the gap and his campaign suffered blows in court in its effort to get favorable ballots counted.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Police report reveals assault allegations against Hegseth, Trump's pick for defense secretary
item.description: SANTA CRUZ, Calif. (AP) — A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave, according to a detailed investigative report made public late Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA MENDOZA, BRIAN SLODYSKO and JULIET LINDERMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Pro-Ukraine lawmakers make last-ditch effort to safeguard US support
item.description: Pro-Ukraine lawmakers in both parties are working to get key provisions surrounding U.S. support for Kyiv passed into law by January, an effort to safeguard assistance that is under threat in a transition to a Trump administration and full GOP control of Congress.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats will push for release of Gaetz report despite withdrawal from AG running
item.description: House Democrats will push to release the Ethics Committee report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) despite Gaetz's decision Thursday to withdraw his name from the running to lead the Justice Department in President-elect Trump's incoming administration. Rep. Sean Casten (D-Ill.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump chooses loyalist Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Matt Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Florida legislators won't have special session for condo concerns
item.description: Florida condo owners are facing a conundrum. Units for sale are sitting on the market longer and owners who want to stay are facing rising costs.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Senate rejects effort from Bernie Sanders to block some weapons for Israel over Gaza deaths
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate on Wednesday rejected attempts by Sen. Bernie Sanders Wednesday to block sales of offensive weapons to Israel for its war in Gaza over mounting civilian deaths there.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wrangling over whether to punt government funding to Trump heats up
item.description: The debate among Republicans over whether to punt government funding into the new year is heating up, as lawmakers race toward their next shutdown deadline. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) this week said lawmakers are running out of time until the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Few Americans use 'woke' terminology: Survey
item.description: In the YouGov survey, under a quarter of Americans polled said they “regularly use” words and phrases such as “safe space,” “woke,” "lived experience” and “white privilege.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Trump-DeSantis complicated relationship could impact Senate pick: political expert
item.description: Gov. Ron DeSantis has a big decision to make if Sen. Marco Rubio is confirmed as the next Secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC
